entity.label: Zohar
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: The father of Ephron the Hittite (Gen. 23:8).

nodes.label: Zohar
nodes.description: The father of Ephron the Hittite (Gen. 23:8).

nodes.label: Ephron
nodes.description: The son of Zohar a Hittite, the owner of the field and cave of Machpelah (q.v.), which Abraham bought for 400 shekels of silver (Gen. 23:8-17; 25:9; 49:29, 30).

verses.text: And he communed with them, saying, If it be your mind that I should bury my dead out of my sight; hear me, and intreat for me to Ephron the son of Zohar,
And his sons Isaac and Ishmael buried him in the cave of Machpelah, in the field of Ephron the son of Zohar the Hittite, which is before Mamre;
